## Description
&#10;&#9;&#9; Mylar film that can be coated with evaporated aluminum on one side&#10;&#9;&#9;

## Characteristics

| Attribute      | Value |
|--------:|:------|
|Type:|Manufacture|
|Skill Level:|2|
|Tech Level:|2|
|Process Time:|40.0 millisols|
|Tooling:|Chemical|
|Work Level:|10.0 millisols|
|Power Required:|0.05 kW/hr|
